text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've come to watch the Arima Kinen, where
Mejiro Palmer sees Oguri Cap overcome
tremendous pressure to achieve a dramatic
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Oguri Cap tells Mejiro Palmer that she
turns pressure into power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer declares that she'll get strong
enough to never worry about pressure.
